title: AI-Driven Early Warning System for Flash Floods in Tangail District
description: Developing a machine learning model integrating satellite data and IoT river sensors to provide 48-hour advance flood warnings to vulnerable communities.

title: Climate-Resilient Rice Varieties Using CRISPR Gene Editing
description: International collaborative research to produce salinity and drought tolerant rice strains suited for Bangladesh's coastal and flood-prone regions.

title: Low-Cost Dengue Rapid Diagnostic Kit Development
description: Development of a paper-based microfluidic diagnostic device for dengue serotype detection, targeting affordability for rural health clinics.

title: Smart Microgrid for Rural Electrification – Phase II
description: Scaling a successful Phase I pilot to 10 villages in Tangail, integrating solar, storage, and community-managed smart metering systems.

title: Gender Disparities in STEM Education: A Bangladesh Perspective
description: Mixed-methods study examining structural, social, and institutional barriers to female participation in STEM at public universities in Bangladesh.

title: Arsenic Remediation in Groundwater Using Nano-Filtration
description: Engineering cost-effective iron-oxide nano-filter units for point-of-use arsenic removal from tube well water across rural Tangail households.
